assignment_description:
Chalk Lettering
⍞ Materials: The Complete Book of Chalk Lettering

➜ VIEW
Watch the tutorial and become familiar with your tools.
∞ Video Link: Lettering: Intro and Tools

➜ READ, NARRATE, & DISCUSS
"The ABCs of Chalk Lettering" Ch.1 p.3-7

➜ PRACTICE
Prepare your chalkboard. Draw letters using shoulder muscles like in Art Instruction lessons.

• COMMONPLACE BOOK
Write beautiful quotes or mottoes with creative lettering.

Anatomy of Letters
⍞ Materials: The Complete Book of Chalk Lettering

➜ VIEW
Watch the tutorial.
∞ Video Link: Lettering: Anatomy of Letters

➜ READ, NARRATE, & DISCUSS
"Lowdown on Letters" Ch.1 p.8-9

➜ PRACTICE
Draw your name. Use shoulder muscles and incorporate lettering aspects.

• COMMONPLACE BOOK
Write beautiful quotes or mottoes with creative lettering.

Sans Serif Style
⍞ Materials: The Complete Book of Chalk Lettering

➜ VIEW
Watch the tutorial.
∞ Video Link: Lettering: Sans Serif Style

➜ READ, NARRATE, & DISCUSS
"Sans Serif Characteristics; How to Draw a Sans Serif Style" Ch.1 p.10, 12

➜ PRACTICE
Follow the steps in the book, incorporating tips from the tutorial.

• COMMONPLACE BOOK
Write beautiful quotes or mottoes with creative lettering.

Sans Serif Style (cont.)
⍞ Materials: The Complete Book of Chalk Lettering

➜ RECAP
Talk about the characteristics of the sans serif lettering style.

➜ PRACTICE
Draw letters in sans serif style. Vary line width and value.

• COMMONPLACE BOOK
Write beautiful quotes or mottoes with creative lettering.

assignment_description:
Choosing Lettering Styles
⍞ Materials: The Complete Book of Chalk Lettering

➜ RECAP
Explain the difference between "The Big Three" lettering styles.

➜ READ, NARRATE, & DISCUSS
"Choosing Lettering Styles; What Are Your Words Really Saying?" Ch.2 p.18-19

➜ PRACTICE
Draw words using different lettering styles.

• COMMONPLACE BOOK
Write beautiful quotes or mottoes with creative lettering.

Choosing Lettering Styles (cont.)
⍞ Materials: The Complete Book of Chalk Lettering

➜ RECAP
Explain what different aspects affect the mood of a design.

➜ PRACTICE
Draw words using different styles to convey different moods. Vary line width and value.

• COMMONPLACE BOOK
Write beautiful quotes or mottoes with creative lettering.

Finding Inspiration
⍞ Materials: The Complete Book of Chalk Lettering

➜ READ, NARRATE, & DISCUSS
"Finding Inspiration, Sketching Designs" Ch.2 p.20

➜ PRACTICE
Set aside an "inspiration space" in your Commonplace Book to collect inspirational quotes that you would like to use in your chalk designs this term. Spend time today searching for inspiration and adding to that list.

• COMMONPLACE BOOK
Write beautiful quotes or mottoes with creative lettering.

Finding Inspiration (cont.)
⍞ Materials: The Complete Book of Chalk Lettering

➜ RECAP
Tell about how to make pencil and paper sketches and their importance.

➜ PRACTICE
Do a few pencil and paper sketches of designs using quotes from your inspiration list.

• COMMONPLACE BOOK
Write beautiful quotes or mottoes with creative lettering.

Composition: Guidelines
⍞ Materials: The Complete Book of Chalk Lettering

➜ VIEW
Watch the tutorial.
∞ Video Link: Lettering: Composition: Guidelines

➜ READ, NARRATE, & DISCUSS
"Placing Chalk Guides" Ch.2 p.21

➜ PRACTICE
Set up composition guidelines on the chalkboard for one of your pencil and paper sketches. Remember you are only practicing guidelines at this time. You are not completing projects with lettering.

• COMMONPLACE BOOK
Write beautiful quotes or mottoes with creative lettering.

Composition: Guidelines (cont.)
⍞ Materials: The Complete Book of Chalk Lettering

➜ PRACTICE
Set up composition guidelines on the chalkboard for more of your pencil and paper sketches. Remember you are only practicing guidelines at this time. You are not completing projects with lettering.

• COMMONPLACE BOOK
Write beautiful quotes or mottoes with creative lettering.

Composition: Principles of Design
⍞ Materials: The Complete Book of Chalk Lettering

➜ READ, NARRATE, & DISCUSS
"Principles of Design; Design Dissected; How to Design a Chalk Layout"
Ch.2 p.22-26

➜ VIEW
Watch the tutorial
∞ Video Link: Lettering: Composition: Principles of Design

• COMMONPLACE BOOK
Write beautiful quotes or mottoes with creative lettering.

Principles of Design (cont.)
⍞ Materials: The Complete Book of Chalk Lettering

➜ RECAP
Choose one of the three designs and dissect it using the five main principles of design.
∞ Image Link: Dissecting Designs

➜ PRACTICE
Choose one of your pencil and paper sketches and rework the composition, incorporating the principles of design.

Chalkboard Project 2
⍞ Materials: The Complete Book of Chalk Lettering

➜ PRACTICE
Put together all of the pieces learned this term and plan a chalkboard project. Set up a composition using guidelines to incorporate principles of design. Vary the letter styles, line width, and value. Complete over three weeks.

Chalkboard Project 2 (cont.)
⍞ Materials: The Complete Book of Chalk Lettering

➜ PRACTICE
Work on term project.

Chalkboard Project 2 (cont.)
⍞ Materials: The Complete Book of Chalk Lettering

➜ PRACTICE
Work on term project.

Exam Week

➜ EXAMS
Answer question(s) related to course.

Questions will come from:
Complete Book of Chalk Lettering
assignment_teachersNote:
